name: Crown Colony Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Crown Colony Country Club in Lufkin, TX! There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include food, restrooms, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Crown Colony HOA
description: Must be a homeowner or guest of homeowner to reserve/play.
fees: Private — Must be homeowner or guest of homeowner to reserve play.

name: LiveWell Athletic Club
description: LiveWell Athletic Club is a place to play pickleball in Lufkin, TX. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, locker rooms, a pro shop or equipment store, lights, and food.
fees: Fee required — Guest passes are available to non members

name: Lufkin / Diboll Texas Area
description: Lufkin / Diboll Texas Area is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Diboll, TX. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Lufkin Parks & Rec - Chamber Park Courts
description: Lufkin Parks & Rec - Chamber Park Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lufkin, TX. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Parks and Recreation
description: Parks and Recreation is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lufkin, TX. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to food, restrooms, and water.

name: The Orcutt's
description: The Orcutt's is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Diboll, TX. The court surface is concrete. You'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.
